name: marjo-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins: PHP language servers, git workflow skills, and LLM wiki maintenance

plugins.name: funzies
plugins.description: Fun thinking-style skills and an agent: first-principles breakdowns and What Would Elon Do analysis

plugins.name: wiki-toolkit
plugins.description: Skills for maintaining a Karpathy-style LLM wiki: ingest knowledge, look it up, run checkpoints, and lint the wiki

plugins.name: git-conventions
plugins.description: Git workflow skills: Conventional Commit messages and merge request contribution descriptions

plugins.name: php-lspx
plugins.description: PHP language server: intelephense and phpactor multiplexed via lspx for completion, diagnostics, and refactoring

plugins.name: php-code-simplifier
plugins.description: Agent that simplifies and refines PHP code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving functionality
